overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a leather jacket walking through a rain-soaked 1940s-style city at night. The character navigates covered walkways, crosses intersections with tram tracks, and passes historic buildings including the COEN'S theater, with wet streets reflecting the warm glow of vintage street lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with shop fronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath a glass canopy, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in white dress walking toward camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: glass and metal canopy covering the pedestrian walkway
storefront windows with reflections of street lights
black metal public trash receptacle on sidewalk
ornate cast iron lamp post with warm glowing light

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered sidewalk beneath a glass canopy, passing shop windows and pedestrians. The wet pavement reflects the warm glow of vintage street lamps, while the covered roof provides shelter from the night air.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with tram tracks

events.description: exits covered walkway and steps onto open street intersection
military truck passes through the intersection from right to left

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection at the crosswalk, navigating around vehicles and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: green military truck driving through the intersection
man in cap and jacket crossing the street alongside ego

entered.detail: large stone building with arched windows and decorative cornice
red traffic signal suspended over the intersection
tall palm trees lining the far side of the street
metal tram rails embedded in the asphalt road surface

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the character crosses a wide open intersection with tram tracks embedded in the road. A green military truck passes by as the character navigates the crosswalk, with a large historic stone building rising ahead and palm trees visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: theater district street with historic architecture

events.description: COEN'S theater sign becomes visible ahead on the right side
character passes directly under the COEN'S theater marquee

agents.ego_description: walking along the street past historic buildings, approaching and passing the illuminated theater

notable_agents.action: man in light colored jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large illuminated vertical theater sign with red neon lettering
glass and metal public transit shelter with bench inside

segments.scene_description: Walking along the theater district, the character approaches the illuminated COEN'S theater sign, which glows red against the night sky. The character passes under the marquee and continues past a glass tram shelter, with historic stone buildings lining the left side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with storefronts and tram stop

events.description: passes the tram shelter and continues deeper into the city street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street past the tram shelter, moving toward the next intersection

entered.detail: ground floor commercial shops with illuminated signage

segments.scene_description: Having passed the theater, the character continues down the wet sidewalk past the tram shelter and various storefronts. The historic buildings recede into the distance as the character approaches the next intersection, with vintage street lamps continuing to illuminate the rain-slicked pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked city street that transitions from a sheltered walkway into an open, illuminated theater district. It begins with the character walking beneath a glass canopy, where the wet pavement reflects the warm glow of vintage street lamps. As the character emerges from the shelter, the scene opens into a wide intersection with embedded tram tracks and a passing green military truck, leading toward a large historic stone building and distant palm trees. The camera then follows the character into the theater district, passing under the glowing red marquee of the COEN'S theater and a glass tram shelter. Finally, the view extends down the rain-slicked sidewalk past various storefronts as the historic buildings recede toward a distant intersection.
